ham.subject: Out of Office: Alex Thompson
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office and will return on 15 May 2024. I will have limited access to email during this period.

For urgent matters, please contact Sarah at sarah.jones@example.com or call 555-1234.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best,
Alex

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #987654 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

QuickBooks Online has detected an overdue invoice. Please review and pay immediately to avoid service disruption.

Invoice #: 987654
Amount Due: $2,345.67
Due Date: 10 days from today

Failure to pay will result in a temporary suspension of your QuickBooks services.

To view or make payment, click <URL>.

If you have already paid, please disregard this message.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,

QuickBooks Support
